name: Open-Faced Tuna Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tuna in oil; drained, flaked
recipeInstructions: In a bowl, combine the tuna, apple, onion, walnuts, mayonnaise, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Spread the mixture onto each bread slice; top with a cheese slice. Broil 4 inches from the heat for 5 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
